L1.head: precise control of surface coating with organic molecules
L1.tail: interaction between functional groups/chain lengths and surface plasmon resonance
L1.claim: 有机分子的官能团和链长与表面等离子共振相互作用

L1.head: external electromagnetic field
L1.claim: 外部电磁场调整纳米粒子表面的电子分布

L1.head: altered electron distribution
L1.tail: precise tuning of absorption and scattering spectra
L1.claim: 电子分布的改变导致吸收和散射光谱的精确调节

L1.head: precise tuning of absorption and scattering spectra
L1.tail: targeted optical properties (peak wavelength, bandwidth, intensity)
L1.claim: 光谱的精确调节允许实现特定的光学性质

L1.head: spectroscopic measurements and electron microscopy
L1.claim: 实验测量验证特定的光学性质
